scripts.firebase:hosting: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools@latest deploy --project saad-ewida-science-platform --only hosting
scripts.firebase:prepare: npm run test && npm run build && npm --prefix functions ci --omit=dev
scripts.firebase:deploy:all: npm run test && npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools@latest deploy --project saad-ewida-science-platform --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage,functions,hosting
